issues: Code imports fetch_twitter_activity from crazy.adapters.twitter_activity - correct adapter import.

Code uses 'tweets' and 'sentiment_score' columns from adapter output, but adapter contract only guarantees 'date' and 'tweets' columns; 'sentiment_score' column is not part of the adapter contract and thus not guaranteed.
Signal logic correctly implements trigger: sentiment increase > 30% over 7-day avg and at least 100 posts, mapping to RISK_ON (BUY).
Exit logic partially implemented: sells (RISK_OFF) when sentiment reverts below 7-day avg, but does NOT implement exit after 5 trading days as per spec.
Allocation logic uses 2% per position and max 10 positions, consistent with spec.
Signal aggregation returns a single signal string (RISK_ON, RISK_OFF, HOLD) instead of per-ticker signals; spec implies per-ticker signals for entry/exit decisions.
Overall, missing required 'sentiment_score' column in adapter output and missing 5-day exit condition cause failure.
